name: Sweet Potato Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together and cut in the margarine until well combined.
2. Add the mashed sweet potatoes to the mixture. Gradually add the milk to form a dough.
3. Roll or pat the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch on a floured surface. Cut with a biscuit cutter.
4. Bake in a non-stick pan at 425°F for 12-15 minutes.
(113 calories per serving) 1 serving=1 Bread exchange 1 Fat exchange
These biscuits are excellent served with ham. Variation: Use 1/3 cup whole wheat flour and 2/3 cup white flour.
